title: AI × Blockchain: The Long-Tail Problem and Decentralized Intelligence

sources.title: The Long-Tail Problem in AI, and How Autonomous Markets Can Solve It
AINFT — Make AI accountable, reproducible, and valuable
4 Eras of Blockchain Computing: Degrees of Composability

description: An integrated learning path covering the convergence of AI and blockchain technologies, exploring how decentralized autonomous markets can solve AI's long-tail problem, the economics of GPU infrastructure, accountable AI components (AINFT), blockchain composability evolution, and dynamic NFTs as evolving digital assets.
